# Agustin Gonzalez Nicolini — Leadership & Engineering Coaching

> Agustin Gonzalez Nicolini is an executive coach for engineering leaders —
> from new engineering managers to CTOs — working from Berlin, Germany with
> remote clients worldwide. His last operating role was VP of Engineering
> at JUCR (2022–2025), and his career spans fintech, gaming, e-mobility
> (EV charging), and healthtech, going back more than fifteen years.

Website: https://agusgonzaleznic.com
Contact: info@agusgonzaleznic.com
Location: Berlin, Germany (remote coaching, worldwide)
Languages: English, Spanish, German
Book a session: https://calendar.app.google/kFaanhSae5WefLnD7

## Who he coaches

- CTOs and VPs of Engineering
- Directors and engineering managers
- Tech leads
- Individual contributors stepping into management for the first time

## Coaching services

- **Executive Leadership Coaching (CTO & VP level)** — for leaders who answer
  to a board or founders: org design at scale, influence with stakeholders and
  the C-suite, technology strategy, and executive presence. Bi-weekly
  60-minute sessions.
- **Team & Manager Coaching (manager & director level)** — for managers and
  directors whose teams have more in them: DORA metrics, healthier team
  rituals, hiring and performance systems, on-call and incident practice, and
  trunk-based DevOps/GitOps delivery. Weekly or bi-weekly 45-minute sessions.
- **Career Transition Coaching (IC to leadership and beyond)** — 8–12 week
  structured programs, with weekly check-ins, for the moves that change how
  you work: IC to manager, manager to director, director to VP — plus
  interview preparation for leadership roles.

New clients begin with a free 30-minute introductory call to check fit.

## Coaching philosophy

- **Growth through clarity** — explicit goals, feedback loops that work, and
  OKRs connecting personal development to company results.
- **Empowerment through systems** — delivery systems (DevOps and GitOps
  practice, DORA metrics, decision frameworks) so teams move quickly without
  waiting on their leader.
- **Leadership through empathy** — psychological safety and intentional
  mentorship, building teams people don't want to leave.

## Areas of expertise

Engineering leadership; executive coaching; scaling teams and organizations;
DevOps, GitOps, and platform engineering; DORA metrics; cloud-native
architecture; FinOps and cloud cost control; site reliability and incident
management; organizational design; and transitions from engineering into
management.

## Representative results (from teams he has led)

- Cut cloud spend by 40% through FinOps practice and vendor negotiation.
- Sustained 99.99% uptime with DR/HA playbooks and multi-region failover.
- Made releases 3× faster via GitOps, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
- Shortened lead time by 75% after moving to multi-account AWS with automated
  deployments.
- Lifted team velocity 50% by pairing OKRs with DORA metrics.
- Sped up onboarding 60% by standardizing processes and documentation.

## Experience

- 2022–2025 — VP of Engineering at JUCR GmbH (EV charging): ran the
  multi-account AWS migration, unified 5+ SaaS services, sustained 99.99%
  uptime.
- 2020–2022 — Cloud Security Manager at Wildlife Studios (gaming): maintained
  strict security controls without slowing feature delivery for game teams.
- 2018–2021 — DevOps Lead at Ualá (fintech): core banking delivered serverless
  end to end, with PCI-DSS compliance work and security hardening.
- 2014–2018 — Infrastructure & Security Lead at Bdev (healthtech): took
  on-premise systems into AWS and drove compliance with SOC 2 and ISO 27001.
